### Regression and compatibility considerations

- [ ] New or updated regression coverage is included
- [ ] Saved configuration compatibility was considered

## Documentation

## Review checklist

- [ ] The diff contains no unrelated changes
- [ ] Existing behavior outside the approved scope is preserved
- [ ] Non-obvious calculations and assumptions are documented
- [ ] No secrets, private datasets, or unintended personal data are included
- [ ] Generated code has been reviewed rather than accepted solely because tests pass
